title: Schneider Electric India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Schneider Electric India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
